title: Roundtable discussion response
description: One model seat's response in a free, role-free discussion round. The seat sees the settled agreements and the still-open points (with every seat's current position) and responds on the merits — changing its mind, refining, proposing a merged reading, or holding.

point_responses.description: One entry per open point (D1, D2, ...) presented in the brief.

position.description: The seat's current reading of this point after considering the others' positions.

agree.description: True if the seat now agrees with the emerging shared reading of this point.

reasoning.description: Why the seat holds this position, argued from the request itself.

changed_mind.description: Points the seat changed its position on this round, and why.

held.description: Points the seat is holding its prior position on, with the reason it was not persuaded.

confidence.description: The seat's confidence (0-100) in its current overall interpretation.
